---
title: "adhd 8812 1"
format: html
editor: visual
---

ADHD

```{r}
packages <- c(
  "readxl", "dplyr", "tidyr", "stringr",
  "lavaan", "semTools", "psych", "broom"
)

to_install <- packages[!packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())]
if(length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lavaan)
library(semTools)
library(psych)
library(broom)

data_path <- "/Users/yangsiyutong/Desktop/adhd 8812/QuestionPro-SR-RawData-4077617-04-12-2026-T094743.646.xlsx"

raw <- read_excel(
  data_path,
  sheet = "原始数据",
  .name_repair = "minimal"
)

dat <- tibble(
  id = raw[[1]],
  sex = raw[[10]],
  age = raw[[11]],
  
  multi_partner = raw[[12]],
  
  mate1 = raw[[25]],
  mate2 = raw[[26]],
  mate3 = raw[[27]],
  mate4 = raw[[28]],
  mate5 = raw[[29]],
  
  adhd1  = raw[[33]],
  adhd2  = raw[[34]],
  adhd3  = raw[[35]],
  adhd4  = raw[[36]],
  adhd5  = raw[[37]],
  adhd6  = raw[[38]],
  adhd7  = raw[[39]],
  adhd8  = raw[[40]],
  adhd9  = raw[[41]],
  adhd10 = raw[[42]],
  adhd11 = raw[[43]],
  adhd12 = raw[[44]],
  adhd13 = raw[[45]],
  adhd14 = raw[[46]],
  adhd15 = raw[[47]],
  adhd16 = raw[[48]],
  adhd17 = raw[[49]],
  adhd18 = raw[[50]]
)

adhd_map <- c(
  "从不" = 1,
  "很少" = 2,
  "有时" = 3,
  "经常" = 4,
  "非常经常" = 5
)

recode_adhd <- function(x){
  x <- str_squish(as.character(x))
  x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  x_lab <- as.numeric(unname(adhd_map[x]))
  ifelse(!is.na(x_num), x_num, x_lab)
}

recode_inter <- function(x){
  x <- str_squish(as.character(x))
  case_when(
    str_detect(x, "^B") ~ 1,
    str_detect(x, "^A") ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
}

row_mean_min <- function(data, vars, min_items = 1){
  x <- data[, vars] %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  valid_n <- rowSums(!is.na(x))
  out <- rowMeans(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  out[valid_n < min_items] <- NA_real_
  out
}

adhd_items <- paste0("adhd", 1:18)

inatt_items <- c(
  "adhd1", "adhd2", "adhd3", "adhd4",
  "adhd7", "adhd8", "adhd9", "adhd10", "adhd11"
)

hyper_items <- c(
  "adhd5", "adhd6",
  "adhd12", "adhd13", "adhd14", "adhd15",
  "adhd16", "adhd17", "adhd18"
)

inter_items <- paste0("inter", 1:5)
intra_items <- paste0("intra", 1:5)

dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(adhd_items), recode_adhd),
    
    inter1 = recode_inter(mate1),
    inter2 = recode_inter(mate2),
    inter3 = recode_inter(mate3),
    inter4 = recode_inter(mate4),
    inter5 = recode_inter(mate5),
    
    intra1 = 1 - inter1,
    intra2 = 1 - inter2,
    intra3 = 1 - inter3,
    intra4 = 1 - inter4,
    intra5 = 1 - inter5
  )

dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    adhd_total = row_mean_min(., adhd_items, min_items = 14),
    adhd_inattention = row_mean_min(., inatt_items, min_items = 7),
    adhd_hyperimpulsive = row_mean_min(., hyper_items, min_items = 7),
    
    inter_score = row_mean_min(., inter_items, min_items = 3),
    intra_score = row_mean_min(., intra_items, min_items = 3),
    
    inter_majority = if_else(inter_score >= 0.60, 1, 0, missing = NA_real_),
    intra_majority = if_else(intra_score >= 0.60, 1, 0, missing = NA_real_)
  )

str(dat[, adhd_items])

summary(dat$adhd_total)
summary(dat$inter_score)
summary(dat$intra_score)

table(dat$inter_majority, useNA = "ifany")
table(dat$intra_majority, useNA = "ifany")
```

##CFA model: ADHD as a latent variable

```{r}
dat_cfa <- dat %>%
  select(all_of(adhd_items)) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ordered))

adhd_cfa_total <- paste0(
  "ADHD =~ ",
  paste(adhd_items, collapse = " + ")
)

fit_cfa_total <- cfa(
  adhd_cfa_total,
  data = dat_cfa,
  ordered = adhd_items,
  estimator = "WLSMV",
  parameterization = "theta",
  std.lv = TRUE
)

summary(
  fit_cfa_total,
  fit.measures = TRUE,
  standardized = TRUE
)

fitMeasures(
  fit_cfa_total,
  c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "tli", "rmsea", "srmr")
)

semTools::reliability(fit_cfa_total)
```

Structural model: latent ADHD predicting intersexual-display binary outcome

```{r}
dat_sem_inter <- dat %>%
  select(all_of(adhd_items), inter_majority) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ordered))

sem_inter_model <- paste0(
  "ADHD =~ ",
  paste(adhd_items, collapse = " + "),
  "\ninter_majority ~ ADHD"
)

fit_sem_inter <- sem(
  sem_inter_model,
  data = dat_sem_inter,
  ordered = c(adhd_items, "inter_majority"),
  estimator = "WLSMV",
  parameterization = "theta",
  std.lv = TRUE
)

summary(
  fit_sem_inter,
  fit.measures = TRUE,
  standardized = TRUE
)

parameterEstimates(
  fit_sem_inter,
  standardized = TRUE,
  ci = TRUE
) %>%
  filter(op == "~")
```

Structural model: latent ADHD predicting intrasexual-competition binary outcome

```{r}
dat_sem_intra <- dat %>%
  select(all_of(adhd_items), intra_majority) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ordered))

sem_intra_model <- paste0(
  "ADHD =~ ",
  paste(adhd_items, collapse = " + "),
  "\nintra_majority ~ ADHD"
)

fit_sem_intra <- sem(
  sem_intra_model,
  data = dat_sem_intra,
  ordered = c(adhd_items, "intra_majority"),
  estimator = "WLSMV",
  parameterization = "theta",
  std.lv = TRUE
)

summary(
  fit_sem_intra,
  fit.measures = TRUE,
  standardized = TRUE
)

parameterEstimates(
  fit_sem_intra,
  standardized = TRUE,
  ci = TRUE
) %>%
  filter(op == "~")
```

Final model: ADHD total score predicting inter/intra binary outcome

```{r}
dat_logit <- dat %>%
  select(adhd_total, adhd_inattention, adhd_hyperimpulsive, inter_majority, intra_majority) %>%
  drop_na()

m_inter_total <- glm(
  inter_majority ~ scale(adhd_total),
  data = dat_logit,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

summary(m_inter_total)

tidy(
  m_inter_total,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  conf.int = TRUE
)
```

R chart

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)

dat_logit <- dat %>%
  select(adhd_total, inter_majority, intra_majority) %>%
  drop_na()

adhd_mean <- mean(dat_logit$adhd_total, na.rm = TRUE)
adhd_sd <- sd(dat_logit$adhd_total, na.rm = TRUE)

dat_logit <- dat_logit %>%
  mutate(
    adhd_z = (adhd_total - adhd_mean) / adhd_sd
  )

m_inter_total <- glm(
  inter_majority ~ adhd_z,
  data = dat_logit,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

summary(m_inter_total)

tidy(
  m_inter_total,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  conf.int = TRUE
)

pred_data <- tibble(
  adhd_total = seq(
    min(dat_logit$adhd_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(dat_logit$adhd_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = 100
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    adhd_z = (adhd_total - adhd_mean) / adhd_sd
  )

pred_link <- predict(
  m_inter_total,
  newdata = pred_data,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE
)

pred_data <- pred_data %>%
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred_link$fit,
    se_link = pred_link$se.fit,
    predicted_probability = plogis(fit_link),
    lower = plogis(fit_link - 1.96 * se_link),
    upper = plogis(fit_link + 1.96 * se_link)
  )

ggplot(pred_data, aes(x = adhd_total, y = predicted_probability)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.20) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_jitter(
    data = dat_logit,
    aes(x = adhd_total, y = inter_majority),
    height = 0.05,
    width = 0.03,
    alpha = 0.25,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "ADHD Total Score Predicting Intersexual / Ornament-like Choice",
    x = "ADHD Total Score",
    y = "Predicted Probability of Intersexual / Ornament-like Choice"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

Lower ADHD/Higher ADHD

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(broom)

dat_group <- dat %>%
  select(adhd_total, inter_majority, intra_majority) %>%
  drop_na()

adhd_cutoff <- median(dat_group$adhd_total, na.rm = TRUE)

dat_group <- dat_group %>%
  mutate(
    adhd_group = if_else(
      adhd_total >= adhd_cutoff,
      "ADHD / higher ADHD traits",
      "Non-ADHD / lower ADHD traits"
    )
  )

comparison_table <- dat_group %>%
  group_by(adhd_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_adhd_total = mean(adhd_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_adhd_total = sd(adhd_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    intersexual_n = sum(inter_majority == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    intersexual_percent = mean(inter_majority == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    intrasexual_n = sum(intra_majority == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    intrasexual_percent = mean(intra_majority == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100
  )

comparison_table
```

bar chart

```{r}
ggplot(
  comparison_table,
  aes(x = adhd_group, y = intersexual_percent)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(intersexual_percent, 1), "%")),
    vjust = -0.4,
    size = 4
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Intersexual / Ornament-like Choice by ADHD Group",
    x = "ADHD Group",
    y = "Percentage choosing intersexual / ornament-like option"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

both inter+intra

```{r}
plot_table <- comparison_table %>%
  select(
    adhd_group,
    intersexual_percent,
    intrasexual_percent
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(intersexual_percent, intrasexual_percent),
    names_to = "choice_type",
    values_to = "percent"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    choice_type = recode(
      choice_type,
      intersexual_percent = "Intersexual / ornament-like choice",
      intrasexual_percent = "Intrasexual competition choice"
    )
  )

ggplot(
  plot_table,
  aes(x = adhd_group, y = percent, fill = choice_type)
) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    width = 0.65
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(percent, 1), "%")),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    vjust = -0.4,
    size = 3.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mating Choice Type by ADHD Group",
    x = "ADHD Group",
    y = "Percentage of participants",
    fill = "Choice type"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
m_inter_total <- glm(
  inter_majority ~ scale(adhd_total),
  data = dat_group,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

model_table <- tidy(
  m_inter_total,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  conf.int = TRUE
)

model_table
```
